# Pulse Digital Agency

> Pulse Digital is an AI-powered social media agency helping brands grow through intelligent content strategy, community management, and data-driven marketing.

## What We Do

Pulse Digital provides end-to-end social media management powered by AI. We combine human creativity with machine intelligence to build brands that resonate, audiences that grow, and content that converts.

## Services

- **Social Media Strategy**: AI-driven strategy built on audience insight and platform intelligence
- **Content Creation**: On-brand captions, copy, and creative briefs generated at scale and reviewed by humans
- **Community Management**: Always-on engagement that turns followers into loyal brand advocates
- **Analytics & Reporting**: Clear performance reporting focused on what actually drives growth
- **Scheduling & Publishing**: Full publishing pipeline from approval to posting across all platforms
- **CaptionCraft**: AI caption and content generation tool for social media marketers

## How We Use AI

- Claude AI for caption generation, content briefs, and copy creation
- Predictive analytics to identify trends before they peak
- Intelligent scheduling to post at optimal times for each audience
- Workflow automation for approval flows, scheduling queues, and publishing pipelines
- Machine learning to measure what content actually drives growth

## Target Audience

Brands, marketing teams, and agencies looking to scale their social media presence without sacrificing quality or authenticity.
